message:
refactor: migrate 5 e2e tests to test_e2e_framework.sh (bd-89zv)

Migrate test_e2e_{add_remove,doctor,install,list,self_update}.sh from
ad-hoc test infrastructure to the standardized e2e framework. Replaces
inline counters, colors, setup/cleanup, and assertions with framework
equivalents. All tests continue to pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
